item.title: Most Israeli programs are oriented towards getting welfare people typically from the Wes to make Aliyah, but as resistance to Is...
item.description:
Most Israeli programs are oriented towards getting welfare people typically from the Wes to make Aliyah, but as resistance to Israeli occupation increases the incredibly delicate sensibilities of those people become offended LOL

item.title: The first and most powerful tool of American supremacy: demonization of literally everywhere that has ever challenged it

item.title: This is not to say we shouldn’t have progressivism, it’s to say that all the “civilization” that America claims to have either b...
item.description:
This is not to say we shouldn’t have progressivism, it’s to say that all the “civilization” that America claims to have either by “traditional values” or by “progress” will , as long as imperialism is the predominant economic system, be supported only insofar as they serve white suprmacy, or imperialism



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are getting so comfortable they are now telling the truth
